actions.name: Have not met daryl
actions.npc_text: <i>You look like you're going to make an excellent addition to Paseo Del Mar High School's student body.<n><o>

actions.name: Have met daryl,daryl has confess
actions.npc_text: <i>Okay, detective. You got me. Now are you going to turn me over to the cops?<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl has confessed, and HAve se
actions.npc_text: <i>Hey, I'm there for you sweetheart. I don't care what happens to me. I just want to help.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl has not confessed
actions.npc_text: <i>How can I help my number one detective?<n><o>

actions.name: kitchen, Gas line cu->gas line c
daryl:  Renaissance Man
actions.npc_text: <i>Definitely. You're amazing. You've got a mysterious quality I find very intriguing.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl in diner
actions.npc_text: <i>I flip burgers here at Maxine's. Of course that's  when I'm not making ground-breaking decisions as Student Council President.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  At your service
actions.npc_text: <i>At your service.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  Differnt from other girl
actions.npc_text: <i>You seem different from the other girls. I think I'm going to enjoy being your contact.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  ultimate hang out
actions.npc_text: <i>Sweetheart, you don't get it. Maxine's is the ultimate hang out.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  best burgers in town
actions.npc_text: <i>Only the best burgers in town. Check it out. Since the police arrived, they've had every meal here.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  politics run in the fami
actions.npc_text: <i>Politics run in the family. My father was a Florida state senator. Now how could you resist voting for me?<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  Jake Rogers
actions.npc_text: <i>A student named Jake Rogers. When I found him, it looked like someone had pushed him face first down a flight of stairs. It was nasty.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  absolutely, detective
actions.npc_text: <i>Absolutely, detective.  I'll do anything you want. It's right down the hall from where Jake was killed.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  you name it
actions.npc_text: <i>You name it.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  check out my options
actions.npc_text: <i>That's cool. I always like to check out my options. Isn't Ned worried about you?<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  I'm all yours
actions.npc_text: <i>I am all yours, Nancy. What's on your mind?<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>C<c0>ould you help me find Jake Roger's locker?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  best diner
actions.npc_text: <i>Maxine's is only the best diner in the entire Southeastern United States, thank you very much.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  small town
actions.npc_text: <i>It's a small town. Maxine's is the place  for gossip. That's why the police made it their first stop when they arrived.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  Men in blue
actions.npc_text: <i>Yeah, the men in blue are everywhere. The whole town is freaking out.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>C<c0>ould you help me find Jake Roger's locker?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  wasn't exactly a friend
actions.npc_text: <i>He wasn't exactly a friend. He came by the diner a few times.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  looked like it to me
actions.npc_text: <i>It looked like it to me. One of the police officers said Jake either fell down the stairs on his face, or someone beat him up first.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  If I were ned
actions.npc_text: <i>If I were Ned, I'd be worried about leaving an attractive girl like you alone with a murderer on the loose.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>C<c0>ould you help me find Jake Roger's locker?<h><n>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->half dozen burgers
actions.npc_text: <i>Well, I know the guy can scarf down half a dozen burgers at a time. He's the best linebacker ever to play for the Manatees. He also told me he's really psyched to play college ball next year.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->all becuase of Hulk
actions.npc_text: <i>Paseo Del Mar's high school football team. They're number one this year, all because of Hulk. He's their star.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->hulk's dream
actions.npc_text: <i>Hulk's dream is to become a great college football star and then play for the Miami Dolphins. He lives and breathes football.<n><o>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->I've seen her aroun
actions.npc_text: <i>I've seen her around, but we've never had a class together. I don't think she's ever been to Maxine's.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hy do you think she's never been to the diner?<h><n>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->she's very private
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm not sure. She's very private about what she does after school.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  his name isn't really ha
actions.npc_text: <i>Well for one thing, his name isn't really Hal. He uses Hal because his Japanese name is way hard to pronounce.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->I feel sorry
actions.npc_text: <i>I feel sorry for him because he's missing out on all the fun of high school. He needs to seriously chill.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  can't help you on that o
actions.npc_text: <i>Sorry, can't help you on that one. I'm good, but not that good.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->member of film club
actions.npc_text: <i>Well, Jake was a member of the film club. He was always messing around with video equipment.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->former student
actions.npc_text: <i>A former student donated some high-tech video equipment to the club. Jake was filming his own project.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A<c0>ny idea what Jake's film project was about?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  humble opinion
actions.npc_text: <i>In my humble opinion, you either hand the case over to the police or keep pressuring each of them until somebody cracks.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->wear them down
actions.npc_text: <i>You've got to wear them down, sweetheart. Don't let up with your questions.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->until they break do
actions.npc_text: <i>You know, until they break down and tell you the truth.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->never seen him befo
actions.npc_text: <i>It was weird. I've never seen him before. He just handed me the note and took off.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->It's right here
actions.npc_text: <i>It's right here. It must have something to do with the case.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Jake's face was bru
actions.npc_text: <i>Hmmm, the police said Jake's face was bruised. Hulk had the strength. But I don't think the dude would have risked his football career for anything.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Hulk & college foot
actions.npc_text: <i>If anyone got in the way of Hulk and his college football career, I think Hulk would go seriously ballistic.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  incriminating evidence
actions.npc_text: <i>Look for some incriminating evidence or just wait for one of them to squeal.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Judo is about holds
actions.npc_text: <i>Connie could've done it. But judo is mostly about holds and throws,  not beating someone's face in.<n><o>

actions.name: play DIGI glass cutter fall soun
daryl:  Hal, mild mannered guy
actions.npc_text: <i>Hal is such a mild mannered guy. I don't have a clue what Jake would be blackmailing him for.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->connie seems more t
actions.npc_text: <i>Connie seems more together than that. I guess if she were fighting for her life, she could have done it.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->It's strange
actions.npc_text: <i>It's strange. Connie and Hal seem like the last students at Paseo Del Mar who'd have had anything 	to do with Jake's murder.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Hal keeps to himsel
actions.npc_text: <i>Then again, Hal keeps to himself. No one really knows him well.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Jake wasn't scholar
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake wasn't really what you would call a scholar. I don't know why he'd have that book.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->you're kidding
actions.npc_text: <i>You're kidding, right? The only physical thing Jake did was to think up new ways to get other people to do his work for him.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->prank at first
actions.npc_text: <i>Well, the police thought it was a prank at first, because it didn't look like anything had been taken. Then the pharmacists found one particular drug missing. I think it was a steroid or something.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->something more soli
actions.npc_text: <i>If you only had something more solid. I know the police would take you more seriously.<n><o>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->got me there
actions.npc_text: <i>You got me there detective. But it didn't have to be like this. I  wish we had met under different circumstances.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hat were you selling?  Drugs, trade secrets?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  Didn't know
actions.npc_text: <i>I didn't know what I was getting into. This guy, Mitch Dillon offered me a way to make some fast money.<n><o>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->I like you
actions.npc_text: <i>Because I like you Nancy. You're in extreme danger. If Mitch Dillon finds out about you, he'll try to kill you too.<n><o>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->what kind of danger
actions.npc_text: <i>Nancy, you have no idea what kind of danger you're in right now. Mitch Dillon has nothing to lose at this point. Do yourself a favor and go to the cops.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>o you really want me to go to the police?<h><n>
<c1>W<c0>e need to get more evidence on Mitch Dillon.  If only we can get him to confess his involvement with Jake's murder somehow.<h><n>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->just forget
actions.npc_text: <i>Actually, I wish you could just forget this whole thing ever happened. Since you can't do that, I'd like to help, if it's not too late.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>e need to get more evidence on Mitch Dillon.  If only we can get him to confess his involvement with Jake's murder somehow.<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  care about you
actions.npc_text: <i>I care about you Nancy and wish you weren't involved in this mess. But if you insist, I'll help you catch Mitch.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  I don't know
actions.npc_text: <i>I don't know, but Jake was always getting into someone's business. Maybe he overheard a conversation between me and Mitch.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->not sure
actions.npc_text: <i>Not sure. I guess he was shooting a documentary because I never saw him with a script or any actors.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  Mitch is Capable
actions.npc_text: <i>Mitch is totally capable of it.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>id Mitch also leave that note for me?<h><n>
<c1>W<c0>e need to get more evidence on Mitch Dillon.  If only we can get him to confess his involvement with Jake's murder somehow.<h><n>

actions.name: Have not met connie
actions.npc_text: <i>Hi, I'm Connie.  You're not from around here are you?<n><o>

actions.name: Have met connie, connie is suspi
actions.npc_text: <i>Why all the questions?  What's going on with you, Nancy?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie is Worried
actions.npc_text: <i>Nancy, I'm starting to wonder about you.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie is Scared
actions.npc_text: <i>What is it you want now?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie has confessed
actions.npc_text: <i>Hey, Nancy.  Need something?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie Chickens in Sting
actions.npc_text: <i>There's too much at stake for me right now. I wish I could do more, but I can't.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie is not scared, suspicious
actions.npc_text: <i>What's up, Nancy?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie is Worried, Scared and Su
actions.npc_text: <i>What is it you want now?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie is Scared, Worried but no
actions.npc_text: <i>What is it you want now?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie is Scared, Suspicious but
actions.npc_text: <i>What is it you want now?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie is Worried, Suspicious bu
actions.npc_text: <i>Nancy, I'm starting to wonder about you.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Boring quiet Paseo
actions.npc_text: <i>Usually, Paseo Del Mar High is really quiet and boring. Today, it's totally out of control.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Small School
actions.npc_text: <i>It's a small school.  Nothing ever happens here.  A new student is big news.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0> can't believe you even noticed me with all the excitement on campus today.<h><n>
<c1>F<c0>or a small school there's a lot of activity.<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: There are a
actions.npc_text: <i>There are a ton of police on campus today. It's wild.<n><o>

summary.description: Boiler, no chains & no match book

actions.name: play DIGI tool box open sound
play DIGI tool box open sound
play DIGI tool box open sound
play DIGI tool box open sound
play DIGI tool box open sound
Connie: We girls
actions.npc_text: <i>We girls have to stick together.  There are a lot of wolves walking around campus.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A<c0>ren't you even concerned about the murder?<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: Don't worry.
actions.npc_text: <i>Don't worry. Once this whole thing blows over, it'll be back to the same old routine.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A<c0>re you forgetting one of your classmates was just murdered this morning?<h><n>
<c1>D<c0>oesn't it concern you the murderer is still out there, roaming the halls?<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: Someone found
actions.npc_text: <i>Someone found a dead body at school this morning.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie:You wouldn't
actions.npc_text: <i>You wouldn't want to waste your time with any guys at this school. They're pretty lame.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>S<c0>o now there's one less wolf to avoid?<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: Jake's dead
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake's dead. There's nothing I can do about it now.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Hey, Jake
actions.npc_text: <i>Hey, Jake's luck ran out. That's all. Life goes on.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0>s there more to Jake's murder than just bad luck.<h><n>
<c1>L<c0>ife goes on for everyone but the victim.<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: Don't make
actions.npc_text: <i>Don't make me laugh.  Just because I'm a girl, doesn't mean I can't handle myself.  Jake finally met his match.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Oh, just
actions.npc_text: <i>Oh, just this wanna-be stud named Jake Rogers.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I think
actions.npc_text: <i>I think he was pushed down a flight of stairs or something.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hat makes you think he was pushed and didn't just fall?<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: I heard
actions.npc_text: <i>I heard it was Daryl Gray, Paseo Del Mar's  hot Student Council President.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: There are
actions.npc_text: <i>There are a few who are cool. Jake Rogers was not one of them.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0> take it Jake wasn't very popular.<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: If you
actions.npc_text: <i>If you are referring to Jake, please don't  insult me. No girl in her right mind  would ever think of going out with him.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>idn't I hear you were dating Jake?<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: Jake Rogers.
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake Rogers. Take it from me, he was a total sleaze.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Jake Rogers
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake Rogers brought it on himself.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I gotta
actions.npc_text: <i>I gotta go now. Later.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: That's true
actions.npc_text: <i>That's true. But I guarantee there won't be a crowd at Jake's funeral.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Jake Rogers
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake Rogers was a total creep. Nobody liked him.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I heard
actions.npc_text: <i>I heard his face was all messed up, like he was in a fight. He was always getting into fights.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I avoided
actions.npc_text: <i>I avoided him whenever I could.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Hey a girl
actions.npc_text: <i>Hey, a girl can make a mistake, can't she?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Jake was
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake was rude, self-centered, dishonest and greedy...<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: He's a
actions.npc_text: <i>He's a big jock on campus. Never dated him or anything.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: What a dork
actions.npc_text: <i>What a dork! Hulk Sanchez doesn't know the first thing  about my life. He needs to get a life and stop talking about mine.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Small School
actions.npc_text: <i>Not very well. He's an exchange student from Japan and a total workaholic.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: He told
actions.npc_text: <i>He told me he's trying to get a scholarship for college.  Lately, he's looking really burnt out. I think the  pressure is getting to him.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I wish
actions.npc_text: <i>I wish I knew him better. He's the only guy I'd ever consider dating. He's Student Council President, holds a cool job at a diner called Maxine's and drives a Porsche 911.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>rives a Porsche and works at a diner? That doesn't compute.<h><n>

actions.name: One Date
actions.npc_text: <i>Why would I know his combination? I went on one date with the guy and told myself I'd never do it again.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie Did not Say Date
actions.npc_text: <i>Why would I have known the combination to that jerk's locker?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Suspicious
actions.npc_text: <i>Why are you asking so many questions, Nancy? You're not working for the police are you?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Why questions
actions.npc_text: <i>What a coincidence. Funny, I never noticed.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: No. Why
actions.npc_text: <i>No. Why are you so interested in Jake anyway?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Yes, Nancy
actions.npc_text: <i>Yes, Nancy. I'm the mysterious winner of the men's tournament. It wasn't easy for me, and I'm proud of what I did.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hy did you enter a men's tournament when you could have easily won the women's division?<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: Do you
actions.npc_text: <i>Do you think I would give up everything I've worked for and do a stupid thing like that?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Jake treated
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake treated me really badly, but I'd never kill him.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Are you
actions.npc_text: <i>Are you crazy? Of course not. I didn't kill Jake.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>J<c0>ake was threatening to expose you, get the prize money revoked, maybe even make you lose your black belt. Those are a few solid motives for murder.<h><n>
<c1>W<c0>hoever pushed Jake down the stairs, also beat him up. Someone with a black belt could've done it.<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: I didn't
actions.npc_text: <i>I didn't kill Jake!<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: You can
actions.npc_text: <i>You can turn me in if you want to. I'm telling the truth.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I despised
actions.npc_text: <i>I despised Jake, but I'd never think of killing him.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: My only
actions.npc_text: <i>My only crime was to lie to get into the tournament.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I wish
actions.npc_text: <i>I wish I could, Nancy. I can't take that kind of risk right now.  Not with college just around the corner.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: If I
actions.npc_text: <i>If I get involved, the truth about the tournament would be  exposed. I'll never go to college if that happens.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0>f you cooperated, you'd be helping out Daryl Gray.<h><n>
<c1>D<c0>aryl's life is in danger.  He really needs your help.<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: Daryls family
actions.npc_text: <i>Daryl's family was rich and used to throw major parties all the time. But not anymore.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Hal is
actions.npc_text: <i>Hal is maxing out on course hours this year. He needs to prove  himself if he's going to get a scholarship.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: If he
actions.npc_text: <i>If he doesn't get a scholarship, he'll have to go back to Japan. That would be a total disgrace for his family.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Daryl's cool
actions.npc_text: <i>Oh yeah, Daryl's one of the coolest guys at school.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: This is
actions.npc_text: <i>This is so hard for me. I've been wanting Daryl to notice me since I was a freshman. But I've come too far to mess up my chances of getting into college.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>aryl's life is in danger. He really needs your help.<h><n>
<c1>D<c0>aryl's in big trouble with the police. If he helps catch Jake's killer, the police might go easier on him.<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: This is
actions.npc_text: <i>This is starting to get really intense. I don't want to get  involved, even if it means I would get the chance to help Daryl.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I can't
actions.npc_text: <i>I can't do it. I have too much to lose right now.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: See ya
actions.npc_text: <i>See ya'.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: I'm outta' here, Nancy.
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm outta' here, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Later, Nancy
actions.npc_text: <i>Later, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Bye, Nancy
actions.npc_text: <i>Bye, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Okay, okay
actions.npc_text: <i>Okay, okay, Jake was blackmailing me. Why else would I have gone out with that slimeball?<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: He was
actions.npc_text: <i>He was cruel. He liked to humiliate me in public and told everyone I was his 'Black Belt Babe'.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hy did you enter a men's tournament when you could have easily won the women's division?<h><n>
<c1>C<c0>ould you have hated Jake enough to kill him?<h><n>

actions.name: Connie: The prize
actions.npc_text: <i>The prize money is a lot better in the men's division.  It was enough to cover the tuition for college next year.<n><o>

actions.name: Connie: Hey, I'll
actions.npc_text: <i>Hey, I'll do whatever it takes to reach my goal. Now I'm going to be the first one in my family to go to college.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>C<c0>ould you have hated Jake enough to kill him? <h><n>

actions.name: HULK: I leave the others in the.
actions.npc_text: <i>I leave the others in the dirt man. Soon it's college ball, and then the Miami Dolphins - show time!<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>O<c0>ne of the best teams in the state?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: Everybody knows Hulk Sanch
actions.npc_text: <i>Everybody knows Hulk Sanchez and 'The Hulk' knows everybody.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>id you know the guy who was killed?<h><n>

actions.name: Have not met Hulk
actions.npc_text: <i>Whoa, a new girl at school. Do you realize what destiny has brought you today? Yours truly Hector 'Hulk' Sanchez.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>H<c0>ow did you know I was new here?<h><n>

actions.name: Have met Hulk: Hulk Worried but
actions.npc_text: <i>Back off, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Hulk is Angry but not confession
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm not into pushy girls.  Do me a favor - bother someone else.<n><o>

actions.name: Hulk is Angry and Worried but no
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm not into pushy girls.  Do me a favor - bother someone else.<n><o>

actions.name: Hulk Confessed but no chicken
actions.npc_text: <i>I've told you what I know. Listen, my body's my temple.  I can't risk it for anyone!<n><o>

actions.name: Hulk Chickens
actions.npc_text: <i>Hey, I'm with you, but I can't get involved. There's no way I'm risking my football career.<n><o>

actions.name: Met Hulk, not worried or angry o
actions.npc_text: <i>How's it going?<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Is there anything else...
actions.npc_text: <i>Is there anything else I can enlighten you on?<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0> guess you'd have to be pretty tough to be number one?<h><n>
<c1>W<c0>hy are there so many police here today?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: I've been trying to get th
actions.npc_text: <i>I've been trying to get the coach to change that lame mascot ever since I first made the team.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A<c0>re you sure there's nothing to be afraid of?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  Renaissance Man
actions.npc_text: <i>Hey, you're talking to 'The Man', the number one football player in the state of Florida. I know all the beautiful girls at Paseo Del Mar High, are you kidding?<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>H<c0>ow do you know all the other girls at school?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: Sorry, can't talk now.
actions.npc_text: <i>Sorry, can't talk now. I gotta' go to practice. Later.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: You are new around here..
actions.npc_text: <i>You are new around here! I play for the Manatees, one of the best teams in the state.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Now that I think of it,
actions.npc_text: <i>Now that I think of it, last time I saw them together, Hal seemed pretty upset.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I'm as strong as ever.
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm as strong as ever.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK:  Isn't it obvious? I'm tal
actions.npc_text: <i>Isn't it obvious? I'm tall, dark, handsome, not to mention a superstar athlete.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I had to keep playing..
actions.npc_text: <i>I had to keep playing even though I was hurt. I needed to impress the scouts.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Then I started taking ster
actions.npc_text: <i>Then I started taking steroids. It wasn't worth it because I was still in pain and all my free time was spent playing errand boy for Jake.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Isn't it obvious? I'm tall
actions.npc_text: <i>Isn't it obvious? I'm tall, dark, handsome, not to mention a superstar athlete.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Paseo Del Mar's mascot is
actions.npc_text: <i>Paseo Del Mar's mascot is a manatee. Don't tell me you're afraid of a little sea cow?<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>O<c0>f course not. I know what to do if I come across a manatee.<h><n>
<c1>W<c0>ell, uh, actually I'm scared of them. Aren't they really dangerous?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: Haven't you been reading t
actions.npc_text: <i>Haven't you been reading the papers? Paseo Del Mar High school has been Florida's number one football team for the last four years.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Yeah. I'm playing great fo
actions.npc_text: <i>Yeah. I'm playing great football this year. I'm expecting an offer from a big ten school any day now.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hat will you do if you don't get an offer?<h><n>
<c1>A<c0> big ten school? What will you major in?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: Yeah, just sneeze and it'l
actions.npc_text: <i>Yeah, just sneeze and it'll swim away. Seriously, the Manatees are a great team at a great school. Everyone is cool. Except for a few punks like Jake Rogers.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: You're not from Florida ar
actions.npc_text: <i>You're not from Florida are you? There's nothing to be afraid of. Manatees are the friendliest underwater sea cows around.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Listen sweethart...
actions.npc_text: <i>Listen sweetheart, to be the best, you gotta' be aggressive and show them who's boss. Like the guy who killed Jake.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>T<c0>hat's a pretty harsh way to talk about someone who was murdered.<h><n>
<c1>D<c0>o you enjoy showing people who's boss?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: Somebody killed Jake
actions.npc_text: <i>Somebody killed Jake Rogers.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>o you know why he was killed?<h><n>

actions.name: Hulk Test
actions.npc_text: <i>I  knew Jake. But I didn't hang out with him.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I'm afraid you're asking t
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm afraid you're asking too many questions. What's it to you?<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hy are there so many police here today?<h><n>

summary.description: Aunt's house, den, TV & VCR CU - ON

actions.name: Aunt house, den, TV & VCR closeu
Add Inventory Item, No Hot Spot
HULK: Me? punks like Jake who fe
actions.npc_text: <i>Me? When I walk down the halls, it's punks like Jake Rogers who fear me.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A<c0>re all football players as aggressive as you are, Hulk?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  Renaissance Man
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm Daryl Gray - Renaissance Man, short-order cook, Student Council President and professional escort to pretty new students.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  many talents
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm a man of many talents.  Whoever or whatever you want, I'm the one for you.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>C<c0>ould you help me find Jake Roger's locker?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  I'm here to help
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm here to help. If the police trust me, so can you.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>aryl, you should know I'm involved with someone. I've been seeing him for a while. His name is Ned.<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  plolice chose me
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm convinced that's why the police chose me to be your contact. I'm at the center of everything.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  Tip of ice berg
actions.npc_text: <i>Burgers are just the tip of the iceberg. I'll make whatever you like. I aim to please.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  Maxine is the owner
actions.npc_text: <i>Maxine is the owner. She's still around, adding her special charm to the place.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  hot grill waiting
actions.npc_text: <i>Nancy, I hate to leave such a beautiful detective, but I've got a hot grill waiting for me. See ya' later, okay?<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->college scholarship
actions.npc_text: <i>He's an exchange student who's all study,  no play. And he's obsessed with getting a college scholarship. Poor guy.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hat's wrong with wanting a college scholarship?<h><n>

actions.name: daryl:  try something close to h
actions.npc_text: <i>Maybe try something close to home, like his birthday or his address.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: You have to be aggresive t
actions.npc_text: <i>You have to be aggressive to survive in this world. Jake just couldn't cut it. That's all.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>H<c0>ow well did you know Jake Rogers?<h><n>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Oh yeah, Nancy
actions.npc_text: <i>Oh yeah, Nancy, I just remembered. Some guy dropped off this note for you. I think it's important.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->My gusse is Hulk
actions.npc_text: <i>My guess is Hulk's the one who had the muscle to take on Jake. It could never have been Connie.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Sanchez, prime susp
actions.npc_text: <i>I say Sanchez is your prime suspect. He's the one with the temper and the iron fist.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->be careful
actions.npc_text: <i>But be careful, Nancy. You're in this pretty deep. Things are starting to heat up.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  cash for school
actions.npc_text: <i>I needed the cash for school next year. So, I went for it. All I had to do was pick up a package at the pharmaceutical company.<n><o>

summary.description: have met hulk,not talked  to daryl about hulk

actions.name: Daryl diner->Mithch threatned me
actions.npc_text: <i>But then Mitch threatened me.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>S<c0>o you were a drug runner.  Oh Daryl, but how did Jake find out?<h><n>

actions.name: Daryl diner->deliver food to pla
actions.npc_text: <i>I have to deliver more food to the pharmaceutical plant later. We can try and grab Mitch when I give him the package tonight.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  video tape in my face
actions.npc_text: <i>All I know is one day Jake stuck a video tape in my face and told me he had enough to put me away unless I paid him off. I had no choice but to cooperate.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  get more money
actions.npc_text: <i>I guess he decided he could get more money out of Mitch. That was a big mistake. Mitch is in a different league than Jake.<n><o>

actions.name: daryl:  number one contact
actions.npc_text: <i>Say hello to your number one contact, Ms. Drew.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I like winning if..
actions.npc_text: <i>I like winning if that's what you mean. I do my job out there on the field. My opponents are supposed to fear me.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A<c0>re all football players as aggressive as you are, Hulk?<h><n>

actions.name: Daryl diner->take care
actions.npc_text: <i>Take care, detective.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->BYE NANCY
actions.npc_text: <i>Bye, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->Later Detective
actions.npc_text: <i>Later, detective.<n><o>

actions.name: Daryl diner->see ya' beautiful
actions.npc_text: <i>See ya', beautiful.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I knew Jake but I..
actions.npc_text: <i>I knew Jake. But I didn't hang out with him.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I'm sorry Jake's dead but.
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm sorry Jake's dead, but I can't waste my time worrying about it.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Ther's no way I'm not..
actions.npc_text: <i>There's no way I'm not going to play college ball. Unlike Jake Rogers, I'm a winner.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Football!!
actions.npc_text: <i>Football! I'm destined to become a college star and then turn pro. Then, when I'm famous, jerks like Jake Rogers will eat my socks for breakfast.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Jake Rogers was a loser.
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake Rogers was a loser. No one liked the dude. Even if he'd lived, he was headed for trouble.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I have a big future...
actions.npc_text: <i>Why should it? I have a big future ahead of me. That's all that concerns me.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: My only enemies on field
actions.npc_text: <i>My only enemies are on the field. Off the field, I'm a pussycat.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I'm outta' here.
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm outta' here.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I'll catch you later, beau
actions.npc_text: <i>I'll catch you later, beautiful.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Bye, Nancy.
actions.npc_text: <i>Bye, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Later, sweetheart.
actions.npc_text: <i>Later, sweetheart.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: You have to be aggresive..
actions.npc_text: <i>You have to be aggressive if you want to win.That's why I'm the best.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: She looka-like-a  man..
actions.npc_text: <i>She hangs out at the gym a lot. I heard she's been having a real tough time.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hy do you think she hangs out at the gym so much?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: I don't know. She's a pret
actions.npc_text: <i>I don't know. She's a pretty good athlete, but never joined any of Paseo Del Mar's teams.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hy do you think she never joined any teams?<h><n>

actions.name: HULK: I heard she cash flow prob
actions.npc_text: <i>I heard she's been having a cash flow problem.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Listen sweethart...
actions.npc_text: <i>That dude is always studying. He's a huge fan of mine. Real smart guy! But I never understood why a brain like Tanaka would hang out with slime like Jake Rogers.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Tanaka never missed a game
actions.npc_text: <i>Tanaka never missed a game. That is until he started hanging out with Jake.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Let's just stay..
actions.npc_text: <i>Let's just say I saw them talking together a lot. Jake's locker was right next to Hal's.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Where did you here that?
actions.npc_text: <i>Where did you here that?<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: He seems like a cool guy.
actions.npc_text: <i>He seems like a cool guy. His family used to sponsor the annual football awards dinner until last year. You know he's the one who found Jake's body.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: tear the door off with my.
actions.npc_text: <i>I could tear the door off with my teeth. But it might be easier to just ask Hal Tanaka. His locker was right next to Jake's.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I didn't pay much attentio
actions.npc_text: <i>I didn't pay much attention to Jake.  I'm tired of talking about that loser.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Why would I know about a r
actions.npc_text: <i>Why would I know about a robbery? All I know about is football.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Yeah, he found out I stole
actions.npc_text: <i>Yeah, he found out I stole the steroids and threatened to turn me over to the cops. It would have meant the end of my football career if I didn't cooperate.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Sorry babe, I can't risk..
actions.npc_text: <i>Sorry babe, I can't risk getting involved.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Hmm, not exactly sure.
actions.npc_text: <i>Hmm, not exactly sure.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: You name it - chauffeur,er
actions.npc_text: <i>You name it - chauffeur, errand boy, bodyguard. He loved ordering me around like I was his slave.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I got hurt really bad
actions.npc_text: <i>I got hurt really bad in a game a few weeks back. Broke four ribs and cracked two others.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: The last thing Jake had me
actions.npc_text: <i>The last thing Jake had me do was deliver a note to Daryl Gray. It was in a sealed envelope, so I couldn't read it. My bet is Jake was blackmailing Daryl too.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: I'm not a killer, Nancy I
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm not a killer, Nancy I didn't do it!<n><o>

actions.name: Have not met Hal
actions.npc_text: <i>A new face.  Hi, my name's Hal.  You sure arrived on a day with a lot of activity.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal Chickens
actions.npc_text: <i>Nancy, I'm sorry but I can't talk to you any longer.<n><o>

actions.name: Met Hal but Hal has not confesse
actions.npc_text: <i>Hi, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal Confessed but No Chicken
actions.npc_text: <i>Oh it's you, Nancy.  I'm really embarrassed to see you again.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I study every face I see. To me, the face reveals a lot about a person.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>id you ever study the face of the guy who was killed? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>A murder was committed here last night. Everyone is very stressed out.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Hal Tanaka. Actually, my first name is much longer than that. But I wanted to fit in here in America, so I chose Hal as my nickname.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm a Japanese exchange student. <n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>hy do you think it's easier to have an American name? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>You are a very open person. You like adventure and care about people.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>ow. Not bad. You could make a living at that. <h><n>
<c1>V<c0>ery good. How could you know all that about me? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Oh yeah. Jake Rogers was a dark soul. He created a lot of trouble.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm studying really hard for exams now. My future as a doctor depends on the outcome of these tests.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Also I think the murder has caused a lot of tension at school. <n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A<c0> doctor? Your family must be very proud. <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Yes, a murder was committed here last night. It's frightening.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I want to be part of the culture and succeed in this country.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>o you plan on staying in America after you finish high school? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Maybe. But, my plan is to become a doctor.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>A <c0>doctor? Your family must be very proud. <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I don't have to be a psychic to see you are a good person.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>ow. Not bad. You could make a living at that.<h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake wasn't a happy person and made others around him very unhappy too.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>H<c0>ow did Jake make people around him unhappy?<h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake was an ijimekko. In English you would say 'a bully'. He wasn't very popular.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Yes. They sent me here to study medicine. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I want to help people who are sick. I also want to do well and make my family proud. <n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>o you feel you fit in here? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake Rogers, a student here at Paseo Del Mar High. It's really intense.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0>s that all you know about the murder? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I heard Jake Rogers was pushed down a flight of stairs.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0>s that all you know about the murder? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>My family is counting on me to succeed here.  I must make them proud of me.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>They're such open people. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I admire the freedom here. If you work hard enough, you can achieve anything.<n><o>

choices.text: <c1>D<c0>o you feel you fit in here? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Not really. Only by reputation.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>In my family, it's very important to succeed. I believe hard work will get me into a good university.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake Rogers tried to take the easy way out and look where that led him.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>In Japan, it's very important that you do something your family can take pride in. I have made some mistakes, but I try to be a decent person.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Most of the students were cool when I first arrived. But there were a few, like Jake Rogers, who weren't as friendly towards me.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Sometimes I feel lonely and far away from my family. And, Jake was someone who never made me feel welcome here. <n><o>

choices.text: <c1>H<c0>ow did Jake make you feel unwelcome? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I feel uncomfortable speaking about this now. Please excuse me.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm behind in my studies and must get back to the library. Bye, Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Yes, unlike Jake Rogers, who was an ijimekko. In English, you would say 'a bully'.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Heard of him? Hulk holds the conference record for quarterback sacks. He's been the state's number one player since he was a freshman.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>He's also a candidate for a big university, even with his injury.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Hulk got hurt a few weeks ago. Ever since that game, he hasn't played the same.<n><o>

actions.name: HAL: Worry with injury
actions.npc_text: <i>I worry that his chances of playing for a top school are not as good as before his injury.<n><o>

actions.name: HULK: Classes and dating
actions.npc_text: <i>Yes, we've been in a few classes together.  I think she was dating Jake Rogers.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Connie doesn't know my study habits.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal dome, handle studies
actions.npc_text: <i>I can handle my studies.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Daryl found Jake's body this morning. He's very popular and a good politician too. Just like his father.<n><o>

actions.name: HAL: Dary'ls father
actions.npc_text: <i>Yes, Daryl's father is former U.S. Senator, Eugene Gray. I hear he was a great politician, but not a very good businessman. I think his company went bankrupt a few years ago.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I'm sorry Nancy. I can't help you with that.<n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Hmm, I remember one day Jake was mad because he couldn't open his locker. He told me he wished he had a phone handy. Will that help? <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I didn't know Jake was interested in video. I avoided him whenever I could. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Yes, Nancy. I'm very ashamed. My family will be extremely unhappy about this terrible mistake I have made. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Somehow Jake found out I copied that old essay.  Then he blackmailed me into doing his homework for him. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I had no other choice. My family won't let me stay in the United States unless I get a scholarship next year. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I had to take extra courses to earn the scholarship. Before I realized what I had done, I was buried in work. I copied the essay because I was desperate. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>My future is at stake. I have to make the grades or my family won't continue to pay for my education. I must go now. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Jake demanded I do all his homework for the rest of the semester or he would tell my family everything. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>What else could I do? My family was depending on me to succeed. <n><o>

choices.text: <c1>W<c0>ere you desperate enough to kill him? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I was not happy about the situation, but I would never kill anyone. I value human life. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Please, don't tell anyone about this. I beg you. You will gain nothing if you do, and it would destroy my family if they knew what really happened. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I regret what I have done. Please let me have this chance to become a doctor. I promise to make up for this mistake, even if it takes the rest of my life. <n><o>

choices.text: <c1>I<c0>f you didn't kill Jake, do you have any idea who did? <h><n>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>When I delivered Jake's homework to him the other day, he mentioned being late for a meeting with Daryl Gray. It was very strange. I didn't know they were friends. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i> Good Bye, Nancy. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>See you later, Nancy. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>I must go now, Nancy. <n><o>

actions.name: Hal in Dome
actions.npc_text: <i>Farewell, Nancy. <n><o>

phone_entries.text: <t><c1>George:<c0><n>Fayne residence.<n><n><t><c1>Nancy:<c0><n>George, this is Nancy.  Can you give me<n>some advice?<n><e>
<t><c1>Bess:<c0><n>This is Bess!<n><n><t><c1>Nancy:<c0><n>Bess, I need some help.  Any ideas?<n><e>
<t><c1>Ned:<c0><n>Hello?<n><n><t><c1>Nancy:<c0><n>Hi Ned.  I'm in a jam.  Do you think you<n>can help me out?<n><e>
